journaling_habit.analysis: No paid-upfront journaling streak apps. All major players are free/sub. Gap: simple $1.99 streak-focused journal.

fitness_streak.analysis: Streaks Workout ($2.99, 25K ratings) occupies paid slot. But specialized niches (running-only streak, lifting-only streak) still open. Consider differentiated angle.

chess_habit.analysis: Chess Tactics Pro ($1.99) is tiny (3.2K ratings). Chess daily practice habit tracker with puzzle streak — VALID gap at $0.99-$1.99 level.

art_drawing_streak.analysis: Procreate dominates but is full-featured. Art streak tracker (companion app, not drawing tool) — track daily practice minutes/streaks — zero paid entrants in TRACKER category.

music_practice_streak.analysis: Practice+ ($4.99, only 1.8K ratings) = weak incumbent. Music practice streak tracker with simple timer + streak = VALID gap at $0.99-$1.99.

water_reminder.analysis: CONFIRMED: Still 0 paid-upfront water streak apps. Blue ocean intact. WaterStreak at $1.99 opportunity persists. Total demand 151K+ ratings validated.

reading_tracker.analysis: CONFIRMED: Still 0 paid-upfront reading streak apps. Goodreads 709K demand validated. ReadStreak at $1.99 opportunity still open.
